recommendations.title: The Limehouse Golem
recommendations.overview: A series of murders has shaken the community to the point where people believe that only a legendary creature from dark times – the mythical Golem – must be responsible.

recommendations.title: The Evil Within
recommendations.overview: The sadistic tale of a lonely, mentally handicapped boy who befriends his reflection in an antique mirror. This demonic creature orders him to go on a murderous rampage to kill the people he loves most.

recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: Daddy's Head
recommendations.overview: A boy and his stepmother fear for their safety after an eerie creature resembling the boy's recently deceased father visits them.

recommendations.title: Giallo
recommendations.overview: In Italy, a woman fears her sister has been kidnapped; Inspector Enzo Avolfi fears it's worse. They team up to rescue her from a sadistic killer known only as Yellow.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.

recommendations.title: The Town that Dreaded Sundown
recommendations.overview: A masked maniac terrorizes the same small community where a murderer known as the Phantom Killer struck decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Uma Quase Dupla
recommendations.overview: Keyla the police officer and the unprepared detective Claudio could not be more incompatible. However they are forced to form a duo to solve the series of mysterious murders that are happening in the quiet city of Joinlândia.

recommendations.title: Rest Stop
recommendations.overview: In Texas, the aspirant actress Nicole Carrow runs away home to Los Angeles with her boyfriend Jess Hilts. They drive through a shortcut in an old road, and when they park in a rest stop, Jess is abducted by the sadistic driver of an old yellow truck.
